subcodes.first_line: He who is debarred this day from the Ark of My Name, the Self-Subsisting, is verily among those who are drowned, and for drowning there are diverse ranks [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الذی منع الیوم عن فلک اسمی القیوم انه من المغرقین و للغرق مراتب شتی من
subcodes.subjects: @goodly deeds; actions, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @empty learning; false spirituality
